issue_title: fix(departments): expose parent foreign key field
issue_body_preview:
### This is a ...
- [ ] New feature
- [x] Improvement
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Others

### Motivation
- Department collection metadata did not expose the `parentId` foreign key field in the UI
- `mainDepartmentId` in the departments plugin was also using a non-standard field interface value

##
test_description_zh: 进入NocoBase管理后台，打开部门管理相关的数据表配置页面，查看Department集合的字段列表，确认parentId外键字段是否在UI中可见并可配置；同时检查部门插件中mainDepartmentId字段的接口类型是否正确显示。
expected_result_zh: Department集合的字段列表中应正确显示parentId外键字段，用户可以在UI中看到并配置该字段；mainDepartmentId字段应使用标准的字段接口值，在字段配置界面中正确展示其类型信息。
